title: Slovakian Pork Wrap
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring tender pork, crunchy vegetables, and a side of tangy slaw, all wrapped up in a crispy wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
2. Slice the pork shoulder into thin strips and season with salt and pepper.
3. Grill the pork for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, slice the onions and peppers into thin strips.
5. Grill the onions and peppers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
6. Slice the sausage into thin rounds and grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
7. Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
8. Assemble the wraps by spreading mayonnaise on the bottom half, then adding the pork, onions, peppers, sausage, and cabbage.
9. Sprinkle caraway seeds on top and serve.
